description_long: This rifle features a sleek, modern design with a predominantly black finish and a streamlined silhouette. The body is composed of a robust receiver, an ergonomic pistol grip, and a prominent handguard with visible attachment points for accessories. The stock is a minimalist, wire-frame type, likely collapsible or folding, attached to the rear with a cable or sling. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a cylindrical suppressor, and the underside of the handguard is equipped with a set of four visible shell holders or accessory mounts. The rifle lacks visible advanced optics, instead featuring a simple, low-profile sighting system along the top rail. The overall construction suggests a tactical, urban-use firearm optimized for maneuverability and modularity.
description: A modern, black tactical rifle with a wire-frame stock, long suppressed barrel, and accessory mounts under the handguard. It has a sleek, ergonomic design suited for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile, cylindrical suppressor, and symmetrical handguard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the wire-frame stock, pistol grip, shell holders, and long suppressed barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the slim stock attachment and the symmetrical layout of the handguard and barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the same features as the left, with clear visibility of the stock, grip, and barrel.
